answers: Communication is key, listen actively, respect boundaries, be honest, support growth.
In any relationship: communicate openly, respect boundaries, be honest, and support each other's growth. Healthy relationships lift both people up.
Handling a breakup: give yourself time to grieve, lean on friends, avoid contact for a while, and focus on self-improvement.
Strong relationships are built on trust, honest communication, and mutual respect. Show up consistently for the people who matter to you.
